entry.title: A Nota Técnica 2021.001 (Evento Comprovante de Entrega da NF-e)
entry.content:
Ola,

 

Alguém conhece alguma empresa que implementou o controle de canhoto conforme: A Nota Técnica 2021.001 (Evento Comprovante de Entrega da NF-e).

entry.title: Re: I want to get the registered billing data of Invoice...
entry.content:
Currently, the Invoice Summary Solution does not provide an API to the S/4HANA Cloud customers.

The development team is scheduled to provide an API by the year 2025. This API will enable the customer to get the relevant data of payer invoices and monthly invoices, which can be utilized for custom form development. If the data source for the Invoice Summary be an SD billing document, it is expected that the customer will be able to retrieve the Billing Document Number and some data of fundamental fields through this API.

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: glad to see another canadian 🙂 welcome!

entry.title: XS Job Scheduler Dashboard Using REST API Authentication
entry.content:
Hello Team, 

Following the blog I was able to create the XS Jobs using the scheduler.createJob function, similarly was able to use other functions as well.

I have scheduled a procedure with action as thisAppURI + "/js/hana/execute?hdbprocedure=" + jobActionProcedure.

Now, I am getting "Unauthorised" error when the job is executed. I am using XSUAA for authentication. I also gave username and password in job configuration which has access to execute the procedure but no luck. My guess is to add some API authorisation to that user but cannot find any documents related to that

In this blog, there is some mention to grant using SAP_JWT_TRUST_ACL but it is not ver clear on what has to be done.

Thank You.
Best Regards,

Ajinkya Jadhav

entry.title: Re: AIF messages stuck in status 'In processing' though t...
entry.content:
Please check it in Define Actions T-Code /AIF/CUST - Define Action -> Select Interface.

i explained it in my blog in point 1.6. Please refer it.

https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-blog-posts/use-case-to-demonstrate-aif-structure-persistence-within-sap-s-4/ba-p/13939753

entry.title: Automatic arrival at Door and Activate it
entry.content:
I need to do auto activation of the Door.

Once we assign the door to the TU, in RFUI or via any FM, we should be able to activate the door. Currently we can just activate the TU on RFUI. But there is no such functionality to activate the door.

SAP Extended Warehouse Management

entry.title: Re: SAC Master data entry check the existing record
entry.content:
Hi,

The statement ‘return;’ will abort the function execution if that’s what you mean. 
Cheers, Ivan.

entry.title: Re: Restore All Users Licenses
entry.content:
The File "B1Upf.xml" is located at

C:\Program Files (x86)\SAP\SAP Business One ServerTools\License\webapps\lib

entry.title: Temporal allocation of values in proportion to predetermined weights in SAC
entry.content:
Good day,

I’m trying to allocate a budget over a year per historical weights with an allocation step and am encountering difficulties.

I have completed the steps enumerated in a similar previously asked question (linked below), yet when I run the allocation, the results are not allocated as expected.

Solved: Allocation of values in proportion to last year Ac... - SAP Community

 

As per the image, the current budget per equipment is entirely allocated on 2025-12-31. My goal is to distribute it according to weights from the ‘driver’ measure.

 

In the second image we can see that the budget has not been allocated as I would expect.

 

For equipment BBB, I would expect September through December to each contain 3000$ in the 'Values' measure. Additionally, my drivers have unexpectedly changed. Are my allocation rules incorrect for what I want to do?

 

Any assistance is appreciated.

entry.title: Re: Hello, Comment function is disabled in the SAC Story,...
entry.content: Have you done the necesary steps on BW side for commenting to be working from SAC side? If not, please refer to this help page on supported BW versions and links to configuration needed on BW side. https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/b6cd7dfffb9c4ac7bfe6739b22ff45ce.html

entry.title: Re: SAC Master data entry check the existing record
entry.content: Just a side note, you are able to create new member with out-of-box feature in SAC table, major difference is you won't get value help for property as dropwdown.

entry.title: BAPI or FM to get Process orders details based on input parameters Plant and System status
entry.content:
Hi Experts,
        Is there a BAPI or Function Module available where, if we provide a Plant and System Status (e.g., REL), it will return a list of the required Process Orders?

This would be similar to how COOISPI provides this functionality.

 

I have a requirement to retrieve only the REL Process Orders and verify if the components for those orders are available in the shop floor SLoc. If they are not available, a transfer posting should be made automatically from another SLoc to the shop floor SLoc.

Your expert advice would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance.

Best Regards,

Sandeep

entry.title: Re: How to add link to My Inbox at e-mail Notification ? (Build Process Automation)
entry.content: Update: now links can be added (to an email) but it seems they can only have static text. Archana are there any plans to allow us to reference variables in the link url? This is an essential feature

entry.title: Subcontractor with two receiving plants
entry.content:
We have a scenario with two plants receiving the final assemblies from the subcon vendor. However, the components sent from plant 1 can't be used to produce the final assembly that is due to be delivered to plant 2 and vice versa. Meaning, only the component stock sent from plant 1 to be used to produce the final assemblies for plant 1. Is there any standard way to restrict the usage of the stock sent from plant 1 for demand coming from plant 2?

Example -

  • demand from plant 1 to vendor for final assembly = 200 units
  • the component stock at vendor from plant 1 = 1000 units
  • demand from plant 2 to vendor for final assembly = 300 units
  • the component stock at vendor from plant 2 = 100 units

At vendor location, if we don't segregate the stocks as received from respective plants, the component stock is enough to fulfil the demands of both plants. But in reality, the plant 2 is asking 300 but sent only 100. Considering the final assembly to component BOM ratio is 1:1, there should be a signal for plant 2 to send additional 200 units.

Is there any 'standard' way of stock segregation (say, using classification or subcon MRP area) at subcon vendor location from respective plants and plan the demands by consuming only the respective plants stock?

entry.title: Re: Launchpad Personalization with SAP Business ByDesign Release 1711
entry.content:
Dear Team, 

Is there any option, that i can set up same launchpad for all users with one setting 

Thanks and Regards, 

Krishna

entry.title: Re: SAC with BWLive (BW4HANA) - Copy and Paste to prompt/variable does not work for larger set of va
entry.content: From your ticket, seems a fix is already prepared and to be applied.

entry.title: API for Custom fields
entry.content:
Hi Expert！

I added custom fields in the SAP Public Cloud Service Contract.

I want to integrate the data of the added custom fields with an external system.

In this case, is it necessary to create an API (External API) for the added custom field?

 

Soma

entry.title: Re: Issue depreciation with division
entry.content: thankyou very much

entry.title: In sap adobe forms data is not binding for text field
entry.content: I am trying to bind data to a text field, but it is not showing the parameters of the interface.

entry.title: Re: Enhancing SAP Support: Introducing Business Impact-Driven Case Prioritization
entry.content: Will the local language versions (e.g. Japanese, Chinese, Spanish, Portuguese) of the selection and the prompt be available as well?

entry.title: SAP ERP 公有云指南：如何在会计凭证API 中添加自定义字段?
entry.content:
API Journal Entry Post是一项强大的服务，可以让用户从外部系统过账日记账分录到SAP S/4HANA Cloud系统中。通过使用此入站服务，企业能够有效地整合不同系统间的财务数据，确保信息的一致性和及时性。此外，API还允许根据业务需求进行扩展，满足企业的各种定制化需求。

  1. 为什么需要添加自定义字段

    在实际业务应用中，标准的日记账分录字段可能无法涵盖所有企业特定的业务需求。例如，一些公司可能需要记录特定的项目编号、部门编号、或是合同信息等。此外，添加自定义字段可以帮助企业更细致地分类和分析财务数据，从而提高财务报表的精度和业务决策的可靠性。

    S/4HANA cloud系统为以下 Journal Entry API 启用了扩展字段：

    API Journal Entry – Post (Synchronous)
    API Journal Entry – Post (Asynchronous) 
    同步与异步模式下的 API Journal Entry – Post，在项目（item）、编码块(coding Block)和利润段层面(profitability segment)支持扩展字段。

  2. 如何创建扩展字段并在会计凭证API中启用它？
    1. 登录customizing 系统中，确保用户具有权限（Business catalog: SAP_CORE_BC_EXT_FLD 或 SAP_CORE_BC_EXT_BLE）。具体权限请查看SAP Fiori Apps Reference Library

    2. 选择app “自定义字段”，点击“创建”。

       


      (图一)
    3. 在“新字段”屏幕上，填写以下内容：
      • 商业环境：选择扩展字段所属的环境。 API Journal Entry – Post（同步）和 Journal Entry – Post（异步）支持在以下商业环境中使用扩展字段：Accounting: Coding Block、Accounting: Journal Entry Item 和 Accounting: Market Segment。 API Journal Entry – Change（异步）支持在商业环境 Accounting: Coding Block 中使用扩展字段。
      • 标签：输入扩展字段的名称。
      • 类型：选择扩展字段的数据类型。
      • 长度：输入扩展字段的长度。

        (图二)
    4. 点击“创建并编辑”。

      切换到“SOAP API”选项卡。 如果是为 Journal Entry – Post（同步）和 Journal Entry – Post（异步）API 启用的，请点击“启用”JournalEntryBulkCreationRequest_In 和 JournalEntryCreateRequestConfirmation_In。
       
      如果是为 Journal Entry – Change（异步）API 启用的，请点击“启用”JournalEntryBulkChangeRequest_In。


      (图三)

    5. 如果您希望扩展字段在app“管理日记账分录”中可用，请切换到“UI 和报表”选项卡，然后点击“启用”。
      启用 FAC_FINANCIAL_DOCUMENT_SRV_01 以便在app“管理日记账分录_旧版本(F0717)”中查看自定义字段；
      启用UI_JOURNALENTRY_MANAGE 以便在app “管理 日记账分录_新版本(F0717A)”中查看自定义字段。


    点击“保存”，然后点击“发布”。 

  3. 常见问题

    自定义字段已按照以上指引，在 Journal Entry - Post API 和 app “管理日记账分录”创建并启用，然而如果在已过账的凭证中没有显示自定义字段的值那是哪一步出现问题了呢？


    我们接下来将介绍如何在使用API Journal Entry - Post 时正确地在 payload 中添加自定义字段。常见问题以及解决方案如下：
    • 常见原因一
      payload 首行中未使用正确的Envelope xmlns。一个简单的解决方法是从应用“通信安排（Communication Arrangement）”中直接下载 WSDL/ Service Metadata，然后在SoapUI 等工具中导入即可。例如，正确格式应如下所示：<soapenv:Envelope xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:sfin="http://sap.com/xi/SAPSCORE/SFIN" xmlns:yy1="http://SAPCustomFields.com/YY1_">

    XML 命名空间是在应用“自定义字段”-> “SOAP API” 中确定的。(参考图二)

    • 常见原因二
      在 payload 中的自定义字段缺少自定义字段命名空间前缀。正确的使用方法是,自定义字段前必须加上1)中已定义好的前缀(本例中为yy1)，例如：<yy1:YY1_JE_ITEM_TEST>Test</yy1:YY1_JE_ITEM_TEST>

    • 常见原因三
      自定义字段大小写错误。自定义字段是区分大小写的，请确保严格使用应用“自定义字段”中的“字段名称”定义。 例如：
      错误格式：<yy1:YY1_je_item_test>Test</yy1:YY1_je_item_test>
      正确格式：<yy1:YY1_JE_ITEM_TEST>Test</yy1:YY1_JE_ITEM_TEST>

    • 常见原因四
      没有将自定义字段添加到 payload 的正确服务节点。如果填在在错误的节点将导致自定义字段添加失败。业务上下文决定了数据在屏幕上的显示位置。在此情况下，有三种方法：
      1. 如果自定义字段的业务上下文是Coding Block 类型，请将自定义字段添加到服务节点 <AccountAssignment> 中
      2. 如果自定义字段的业务上下文是 Journal Entry Item 类型，请将自定义字段添加到服务节点 <Item>、<DebtorItem>、<CreditorItem> 或 <ProductTaxItem>中
      3. 如果自定义字段的业务上下文是Market Segment，请将自定义字段添加到服务节点 <ProfitabilitySupplement>中。
        请参见

    （图四）

    最后，附上一个具体的payload 例子供参考

    <soapenv:Envelope xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:sfin="http://sap.com/xi/SAPSCORE/SFIN" xmlns:yy1="http://SAPCustomFields.com/YY1_">

       <soapenv:Header/>

       <soapenv:Body>

          <sfin:JournalEntryBulkCreateRequest>

             <MessageHeader>

                <ID>240120241712_8227761</ID>

                <CreationDateTime>2024-01-24T17:12:13.1234567Z</CreationDateTime>

             </MessageHeader>

             <JournalEntryCreateRequest>

                <MessageHeader>

                   <ID>240120241712_8227761</ID>

                   <CreationDateTime>2024-01-24T17:12:13.1234567Z</CreationDateTime>

                </MessageHeader>

                <JournalEntry>

                   <OriginalReferenceDocumentType>BKPFF</OriginalReferenceDocumentType>

                   <OriginalReferenceDocument>Test</OriginalReferenceDocument>

                   <BusinessTransactionType>RFBU</BusinessTransactionType>

                   <AccountingDocumentType>KZ</AccountingDocumentType>

                   <DocumentReferenceID>9924023360250076</DocumentReferenceID>

                   <CreatedByUser>Test user</CreatedByUser>

                   <CompanyCode>1010</CompanyCode>

                   <DocumentDate>2024-11-20</DocumentDate>

                   <PostingDate>2024-11-20</PostingDate>

                   <TaxDeterminationDate>2024-11-20</TaxDeterminationDate>

                   <Item>

                      <ReferenceDocumentItem>1</ReferenceDocumentItem>

                      <CompanyCode>1010</CompanyCode>

                      <GLAccount>00240010</GLAccount>

                      <AmountInTransactionCurrency currencyCode="CNY">-30000.00</AmountInTransactionCurrency>

                      <DebitCreditCode>H</DebitCreditCode>

                      <DocumentItemText>CustomFieldTest</DocumentItemText>

                      <yy1:YY1_JE_ITEM_TEST>Test</yy1:YY1_JE_ITEM_TEST>

                      <AssignmentReference>123</AssignmentReference>

                      <BusinessPlace>9906</BusinessPlace>

                      <Reference1IDByBusinessPartner>262002804</Reference1IDByBusinessPartner>

                      <HouseBank>DEMO1</HouseBank>

                      <HouseBankAccount>DEMO1</HouseBankAccount>

                      <AccountAssignment>

                         <ProfitCenter>9906</ProfitCenter>

                      </AccountAssignment>

                   </Item>

                   <CreditorItem>

                      <ReferenceDocumentItem>2</ReferenceDocumentItem>

                      <Creditor>0001000020</Creditor>

                      <AmountInTransactionCurrency currencyCode="CNY">30000.00</AmountInTransactionCurrency>

                      <DebitCreditCode>S</DebitCreditCode>

                      <DocumentItemText>MLPM/GFPA/SB00C28CF1IKD54</DocumentItemText>

                      <AssignmentReference>ALVA01MLGF240013</AssignmentReference>

                      <BusinessPlace>9903</BusinessPlace>

                      <Reference1IDByBusinessPartner>262002804</Reference1IDByBusinessPartner>

                      <AccountAssignment></AccountAssignment>

                   </CreditorItem>

                </JournalEntry>

             </JournalEntryCreateRequest>

          </sfin:JournalEntryBulkCreateRequest>

       </soapenv:Body>

    </soapenv:Envelope>

entry.title: TAX: Quebec labour sponsored funds tax credit (Canada Payroll)
entry.content:
Hello All,
We are using Labour-sponsored funds field in infotype 463 to store an amount of $5,000 and during payroll execution, system calculates a 15% tax credit for Federal. We have a custom wage type in recurring infotype 14 to calculate a 15% tax credit for provincial (Quebec). The recurring amount is setup for a weekly payroll area employee with $96.15 to calculate tax credit on annual amount of $4,999.80 ($96.15 x 52). This is working as expected in a Regular payroll run. However, when we execute an Off-cycle bonus run, the wage type from IT0014 is not processed and the tax credit is calculated only for Federal from infotype 463. This is causing a difference in tax calculated for Federal and Provincial.

The workaround we identified is to create the same custom wage type in IT0267 to calculate the tax credit for provincial during off-cycle bonus run, but the system during payroll execution is not considering the annual amount $4,999.80 to calculate the tax credit. The amount is prorated according to the remaining pay periods in the year and the tax credit calculated is not as expected. There’s still a big difference in tax calculated for Federal and Provincial.

We are not using IT0169 for Benefits. We have an ECP setup and benefits are replicated to ECP IT0014 from EC.

Has anyone implemented tax credit for Federal and Quebec and it’s working as expected for both Regular and Off-cycle payroll runs?

Thanks,
Mitesh

entry.title: Can we add more fields in USER FIELDS tab of IM22
entry.content:
The USER Fields tab has the screen fields coming from the structure IMA_USRFLD which are pre-defined by SAP and they can be selected to be displayed or not in this screen from SPRO.

But I have a need to have a different field length and there is no field which has such field length. Though i do an Append to this , it does not get reflected in the SPRO for configuring to display on the IM22 screen. Is there a way to extend the fields or add a new USer field / custom field to be on the screen .

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Why isn't the "enhancement" I added working?
entry.content: @raymond_giuseppi With all due respect, when you say it was removed, do you mean we can't add enhancements here?

entry.title: 🎉 Exciting News: I’m SAP Certified! 🎉
entry.content:
Hey SAP Community,

I’m thrilled to share that I’m now officially an SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition! This certification marks the beginning of an incredible journey, and I’m eager to dive into the opportunities ahead.

I participated in the Vower Bootcamp, where I gained hands-on experience with the SAP Live System and developed key skills such as system configuration, business process integration, and data migration. This program has truly prepared me to take on exciting challenges in the SAP ecosystem. I’m curious about exploring industries like supply chain and manufacturing and how SAP solutions drive efficiency and innovation. Currently, I’m in Vower’s Job Placement Program and ready to kickstart my career in this dynamic field.

  • Huge thanks to David Chavino for your incredible guidance—you’ve been instrumental in helping me reach this milestone, and I’m so grateful! 🙌

Fun fact: I make a killer Pho! ( Vietnamese beef noodle soup)

Let’s connect and collaborate on something amazing. I’m excited to grow, learn, and contribute to the SAP

entry.title: Re: How to add link to My Inbox at e-mail Notification ? (Build Process Automation)
entry.content:
@MikeDoyle,

Adding links in an email is not a new feature.  It has been available for at least the last 12 months and the static link limitation is there from the beginning.  You might like to check out the new notifications feature to see if this addresses the issue:

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/build-process-automation-notifications-part-1-of-3-default-notifications/ba-p/13868088

entry.title: 🎉 Exciting News: I’m SAP Certified! 🎉
entry.content:
Hey SAP Community,

I’m thrilled to share that I’m now officially an SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition! This certification marks the beginning of an incredible journey, and I’m eager to dive into the opportunities ahead.

I participated in the Vower Bootcamp, where I gained hands-on experience with the SAP Live System and developed key skills such as system configuration, business process integration, and data migration. This program has truly prepared me to take on exciting challenges in the SAP ecosystem. I’m curious about exploring industries like supply chain and manufacturing and how SAP solutions drive efficiency and innovation. Currently, I’m in Vower’s Job Placement Program and ready to kickstart my career in this dynamic field.

  • Huge thanks to David Chavino for your incredible guidance—you’ve been instrumental in helping me reach this milestone, and I’m so grateful! 🙌

Fun fact: I make a killer Pho! ( Vietnamese beef noodle soup) Let’s connect and collaborate on something amazing. I’m excited to grow, learn, and contribute to the SAP

entry.title: Re: Transfer of Requirements in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hello Michael,

Can the same process used in Public Cloud

entry.title: Re: MDK : Changes done on VS code are not reflecting in m...
entry.content:
Assuming you are directly bundling to the simulator, the one key thing to make sure is that you did not download definitions from App Update.  Changes directly bundled from VSCode to the simulator are not used if you have downloaded from App Update.

The Base Project value is only used during create client to find the app metadata if it is stored in a subfolder under the .mdkproject/metadata folder. The metadata in the Base Project location is bundled and copied to the client as branded metadata.  Assuming you have the launch.json pointing to your simulator, when bundling from VSCode the metadata is copied over the client branded metadata.

If you don't have an "ns run android --emulator" running in a terminal/command prompt to watch the client location you would need to relaunch your client onto the simulator to pickup the new branded metadata.  If it is running then it normally would relaunch the client on the simulator automatically.

entry.title: Re: Why isn't the "enhancement" I added working?
entry.content:
Please Use FI Validations.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/b6995ca88c524372b0609345b693f8d5/d473c2531bb9b44ce10000000a174cb4.html

entry.title: Sending Customer invoice to Multiple recipients in S/4 Hana with BRF+
entry.content:
Hi,

we have maintained Multiple E-Mails in Business partner and the requirement is to send Invoice to all E-Mails once the Invoice is saved.

Presently system sending Invoice Output only to one E-Mail address as per the SAP standard.

Please suggest how we can achieve this as we are using BRF+ OPD settings

Thank you

entry.title: Re: New or not to the SAP Community, share your story!
entry.content:
Dear All,

I am Rajesh S, and I am new to SAP Basis. Prior to this, I was working with the IT (Infrastructure) team in our company. Since we have an SAP team, I transitioned to SAP Basis to learn and gain knowledge, with the aim of contributing to the success of our organization.

I kindly request your support and guidance as I embark on this learning journey.

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: SM13 update failed while creating a PO in ECC 6
entry.content: Please check all the active Enhancements related to PO especially BADI and check whether you have used Commit statements or BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT Function module anywhere.

entry.title: Re: Issue with Search Functionality in Dynamic Object Card Collection
entry.content: What version of MDK client are you using and on what platform?

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content:
Good Day All,

I'm from Bangalore, India

Regards

Rajesh.S

entry.title: Re: i have created new spool code for TO printing but there is no form error when printing the TO
entry.content: can someone help me out here? really appreciated your expertise.

entry.title: Re: Hello, Comment function is disabled in the SAC Story,...
entry.content:
Hi,

We had followed the below blogs for enabling the data point comments.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/comments-on-bw-bpc-live-connections-in-sap-analytics-cloud/ba-p/13561525#:~:text=Comments%20can%20be%20used%20in,license%20will%20suffice%20to%20comment

https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3398780

Additional security configurations in SAC and BW side were enabled.

Thanks,

Jain

entry.title: Re: Goods Movement at ABAON
entry.content:
If the Enhancement is triggered and you have enough information to pass in Goods movement BAPI but you still cannot perform the goods movement since the previous transaction data is not committed in the system?.

then you have to either create a Update FM or a RFC FM and write your goods movement logic including the commit work.

try first with the update FM and call the update FM in the enhancement point. if this is not working as expected then use the RFC FM in the enhancement by calling it as background task in a separate unit and destination as none. so that the FM will be called in a separate LUW.

entry.title: Re: Issue with Search Functionality in Dynamic Object Card Collection
entry.content: @bill_froelich , i am using MDK client 24.7 version and in Android as well as Web

entry.title: Re: DeepEntity or ChangeSet question
entry.content: When you say "In this phase, I need to call Backend sending Header and Items data inserted from the user." what does that mean?  Are you calling a function in your OData service to return the Price Conditions or how are you passing the data to your Pricing Condition calculator?

entry.title: Re: Publishing values to a recurring pay component from V...
entry.content: Hi Xavier, This might be a bit complex, so thank you for your patience as I explain. 😊 The customer will use the Variable Pay form to calculate the bonus base for employees. Certain roles, such as Comp Ben or Admins, may make minor adjustments to the bonus base or perform some forecasting during this stage. Once finalized, the bonus base will be published to EC as a recurring pay component (BonusBase). Following that, we create a Total Compensation Plan form. Within the Salary tab of this form, merit, promotion, extra and lump sum (bonus) are calculated. For the lump sum target, I’ve mapped the bonus base pay (BonusBase) component from EC and configured the lump sum calculation to be based on this target. We also utilize guidelines and other standard funcionalities. This setup allows managers to handle everything on a single tab. For the Variable Pay tab within the Total Compensation Plan, it primarily serves as an informational section for managers. It provides them with details about the Variable Pay calculation, which they can review if needed. Please let me know if you need further clarification or have additional questions!

entry.title: Re: Change credit segment for sales area -- query on impact
entry.content:
Hi Vishnu,

When changing the assignment of credit control area to sales area/company code it is advised to execute the report UKM_RFDKLI20, so the existing sales documents will get the new KKBER in SD tables (VBAK, LIKP, VBRK) and the credit exposure can be correctly updated.

For open invoices (FI accounting docs) the report UKM_RFDKLI20_AR can be used to update the BSEG table data.

This way the documents would reflect the new credit control area and the credit exposure would move to the credit segment mapped for CCAr.

Newly created documents would determine the CCAr per the changed assignment settings.

Related documentation:
KBA 3444618 - UKM_RFDKLI20 - Recreating SD Credit Master Data in FSCM
KBA 3431396 - UKM_RFDKLI20_AR report does not change credit control area

Best regards,
Edina

entry.title: Re: Note analyzer problem
entry.content:
Hi Prithviraj

Thanks for your help.

ATC check is OK.

entry.title: 2408 update VAT on Retention Payment to Supplier for UAE
entry.content: What are the specific improvements introduced by this feature, and what functionalities have been enabled as a result? Additionally, why is this feature particularly necessary in the context of the United Arab Emirates (UAE)?

entry.title: Datenvolumen SAP GTS System
entry.content:
Hallo,

wir betreiben seit einigen Jahren ein SAP GTS System. 

Uns wurde GTS damals verkauft als kleines System mit ca. 250GB Datenvolumen.

Unser System wächst aber stetig - vor allem die Tabelle /SAPSLL/SPLAUD.

Natürlich gibt es hier vers. Hinweise und wir archivieren regelmäßig.

Wie kann man das Datenwachstum hier eingrenzen - unsere Vermutung ist das hier Protokolle doppelt und dreifach abgelegt werden und unnötig sind.

Gruß Christoph Greiner

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA TM in Subcontracting Scenario
entry.content:
Dear friends of TM,

Subcontracting, in the form of assembling components to a finished product, is a central part in the logistical chain of many industries.

Assuming a simple subcontracting scenario, the following parties are involved:

  • A customer purchases a certain product
  • A buyer receives the purchase order from the customer. As in this case the product must be assembled from some components, the buyer also acts as a so-called passive subcontractor who provides the necessary components to the active subcontractor who assembles the finished product.
  • The active subcontractor then sends the finished product back to the buyer who delivers it to the customer.

Here are some of the possible scenarios how a subcontracting scenario can be set up between the passive and active subcontractor (or the buyer and the entities which assemble the components) regarding the flow of goods of components and the finished product:

This can further be refined by considering the financial chain when the components are either only handed over to the active subcontractor(s) without changing the ownership (‘Buy – Provide’) or whether the components are ‘sold’ to the active subcontractor (‘Buy – Sell’).

But coming back to the flow of goods, there arise transport requirements which need to be planned and executed. And here, our TM comes into play!

From SAP S/4HANA oP2023 FPS2 on, TM supports in the embedded scenario the outbound and inbound moves of the buyer when he ships and receives from the same plant.

Scenario Description

See at next an exemplary scenario from the view of the passive subcontractor/ buyer with TM being involved.

Step 1 (Purchasing):

At the buyer side a sales order for third party processing is created for the product ‘Mat A’ purchased by the customer. Typically, such sales order items have item type ‘TADS’ which triggers automatically the creation of a respective purchase requisition. From that, a subcontracting purchase order with item type ‘L’ is created. Due to the integration with TM, freight unit 2 for the expected finished product is created. This freight unit 2 is relevant for the later inbound from the subcontractor.

Step 2 (Outbound):

Now, the outbound delivery 1 for the shipment of the components ‘B & C’ to the subcontractor is generated from the subcontracting purchase order e.g. with the Subcontracting Cockpit in transaction ME2ON. Hereby, the components are derived from the bill of material of the finished product. For the transportation planning, the outbound delivery is integrated with TM and for the transport requirements freight unit 1 is created and assigned. The freight unit 1 is now planned for the transport (represented by freight order 1) and the corresponding consignment order 1 is used as basis for the advanced shipping notification (ASN) to the subcontractor with the promised delivery date of the components.

Step 3 (Inbound):

The ASN from the subcontractor with the promised delivery date of the finished product is received and consignment order 2 for inbound is created. Hereby it’s important that the subcontractor received an appropriate reference which he can use in the ASN back to the buyer. Because then, the consignment order 2 finds the corresponding freight unit 2 for inbound (which has meanwhile been planned in freight order 2).

The last step is then the delivery to the customer based on the outbound delivery 2 which is created from the sales order. In this example, the buyer is responsible for at least parts of the transport and the planning happens in freight order 3.

This was a very simple scenario for subcontracting in the sense of assembling components where of course also scheduling agreements could have been used. The other scenarios shown are not yet published for the use with TM. But that does not mean that it’s not possible to use at least parts of them with TM by appropriate system settings.

Benefits of TM

TM as a central part of SAP S/4HANA can add a lot of value for customers using this subcontracting scenario as efficient and reliably planned transports are vital to keep complex logistical chains running.

Some of the key points where TM can improve execution and tracking are:

  • Get full visibility for the transport of components and the finished product including transport relevant dates/times and status (e.g. compliance checks, goods receipt/issue, warehouse handling etc.)
  • All available incoterms are considered for the building of respective stages, covering the responsibilities of risk and cost of the involved parties.
  • Use transport and load planning capabilities of TM and assign capacities for the transports from and to the subcontractor for all possible modes of transport.
  • Send ASN with realistic delivery date (calculated by complex heuristics of TM, including schedules, opening hours etc.) for components to align assembly at active subcontractor
  • Receive ASN with delivery date of finished product from passive subcontractor to align delivery to the customer
  • Support returns processing for finished products triggered by QM notification
  • Ensure freight settlement of all transports from/to the subcontractor
  • Enable tendering and subcontracting of carriers for all transports from/to the subcontractor
  • Trigger dangerous goods check for components
  • Use AI capabilities of TM with use cases ‘Intelligent Goods Receipt’ and ‘Conversational Planning’

See here also at one glance the scenario, some of the components TM can be integrated with, a sample freight unit with its execution tracking and the some of the benefits.

Best regards,

Michael

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and SAC import connection setting failure
entry.content:
I'm currently working on an import connection between my company's SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and SAC.
I am proceeding with the work based on the contents of the blog below, but I am having trouble creating "Communication Arrangement".

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-s-4hana-cloud-public-edition%E3%81%A8sap-analytics-cloud%E3%81%AE%E6%8E%A5%E7%B6%9A%E6%96%B9%E6%B3%95/ba-p/13569275

In particular
・New Communication System：Creation Success
System ID : SAC_INTEGRATION_0087
System Name : SAC Integration
・New Communication User：Creation Success
User Name: SAC_COMM_USER
Description: SAC Integration
・New Communication Arrangement：Creation failure
Scenario: SAP_COM_0087
Arrangement Name: SAP_COM_0087
・About the failure situation
"SAP_COM_0087" could not be selected in the New Communication Arrangement/Scenario column.
Could someone please tell me how to resolve it?

Thank you very much.

entry.title: Re: Modify the “Account Modification” value of “account g...
entry.content: After creating a new movement type using the Copy of Movement Type function in Central Business Configuration, Modify Acct Mod. field using CBC's Account modification function.

entry.title: Re: validation for stage as mandatory in marketing documents but stage is not available in any tabl
entry.content: What do you mean by Stages? Can you show some screenshot of it?

entry.title: How to Apply CR to only one planning adso in multiprovider?
entry.content:
Hi, experts.

we have an issue with CR on Multiprovider

 

Composite provider CP1 is composed with 3 adso. (as in Query)

adso1 : Actual expense, not plannable

adso2 : Sales,  planable, but not input-ready

adso3 : Expense, planable, input-ready

 

The Characteristic Relationship is applied to adso3 only.

(check, derivation, create method all implemented)

(the number of combination is 1600)

 

When I open query on RSRT, Warning occured : Maximum number of 2,147,483,647 cr exceeded.

After dozens of attempts, I found out that the combination is normally created

only when CR is applied to adso2 as well..(Just Because adso2 is planable...)

adso2 is just for reference.... I don't want to apply CR to adso2....

 

I don't think that N_BASIC_PROV is very helpful...

entry.title: Re: Time evaluation making the last year leave quota to Zero
entry.content: Dear All I am running PT60 get CL carried forward to next and last year CL will convert OL/2 that is working currect but mean while want to make balance zero last year pending leave after the conversion in OL, So kindly suggest me waht modification need in current PCR to get last year pending leave become ZERO.

entry.title: Re: Change credit segment for sales area -- query on impact
entry.content: Hi Edina good summary. @Vishnu please take into consideration, that the mentioned reports UKM_RFDKLI20* are not processing very fast. I would recommend to test in Quality system before running in production to see if it is helpful to split by customer groups. kind regards Rolf

entry.title: Re: Time evaluation making the last year leave quota to Zero
entry.content: Dear All I am running PT60 get CL carried forward to next and last year CL will convert OL/2 that is working currect but mean while want to make balance zero last year pending leave after the conversion in OL, So kindly suggest me waht modification need in current PCR to get last year pending leave become ZERO

entry.title: Re: Sending Customer invoice to Multiple recipients in S/...
entry.content:
Hello @SivaPrasad_Vasireddy 

 

Currently, as per the standard configuration, the system sends customer invoices to a single email address.

To enable sending customer invoices to multiple email addresses, you need to implement the APOC_ADD_EMAIL_RECIPIENTS BAdI.

For your reference, please find the relevant documentation

Addition of Email Recipients

Best Regards

Vivek Savant

entry.title: Users who printed
entry.content:
Hi All

Is it possible to trace SAP Users who printed a certain document if it has been printed more than once by different SAP Users?

 

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: Re: /SCWM/RF_DE094
entry.content: And the question is?

entry.title: Re: Improving latency between SAP BTP and on prem S4 system over RFC connection
entry.content:
Hi Community,

" From documentation : valid values are LAN or WAN (relevant for fast serialization only). In the WAN
case, a slower, but better compression algorithm is used and in addition, the data is analyzed for further
compression options. For LAN a very fast compression algorithm is used, and data analysis is done only
at a very basic level. Hence. the compression ratio is not as good in that case, but in this case the
transfer time is considered not that dominant like for WAN. Choose this value depending on the network
quality between JCo and your target system to optimize the performance. The default setting is LAN. "

 

Thanks for your selfless sharing, it really help us a lot.

🙂

 

Regards,

ZFiori.

entry.title: Re: Adjusting installer script for SAP NetWeaver Dev Edition for distros with kernel version 5.4 or
entry.content:
I realise that the comments are no longer up to date, but I've just fallen into the same trap as custandcode:
You probably got two warnings before the error messages, which are the actual cause:
Ubuntu 24.04. comes with a glibc > 2.35, which does not work with older Sybase versions (https://me.sap.com/notes/3425215)

entry.title: Re: Does SAP SLT support Azure SQL Database as a source
entry.content:
Unfortunately, answer - NOT supported.

SLT need to create data base triggers on source tables. SLT supports all database types that are supported by SAP, but Azure is not supported DB and as consequence no scripts for Azure

entry.title: STORIES reports from a performance template
entry.content:
we are trying to create reports from a performance template and we need the line to show the name of the form or its ID and in the columns the rest of the data,mainly the fields are customized within sections of the form.

And the records are duplicated for the same form.

 We have not been able to do it after several attempts and we have looked for a template to import from SAP on performance and we have not found it.

Thank you and best regards.

entry.title: Re: Block material for sales order entry in specific plants
entry.content: Thanks for Reply. but our requirement is Plant specific & we can remove the plant from assignment.

entry.title: Creating a URL to connect a dashboard to an Order in 4Hana
entry.content:
Dear Communnity,

I am looking for the answer on how to generate a URL using SQL for a dashboard that i am creating for a client. We want to make it possible for the client to go from our dashboard directly to that certain order in 4hana. I know it is not possible to do with deeplinking, but would one of you have the answer on if it is possible and if yes what componnets should be added to create the URL. 

Sincerly

entry.title: Re: API Material Master Classification
entry.content: to my knowledge target release for the API that supports the update of Material Classification is 2508 (but with usual disclaimer).

entry.title: Synchronize data between two environments in CCV2
entry.content:
User wants to synchronize data between two SAP Commerce Cloud (CCV2) environments, specifically copying media and database data from production to test environment.

User was advised to use the data backup/restore function for a full copy, with a link to KBA 3308351 for details. For exporting a database to a local development environment, user was advised to involve the db team for a database backup.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Synchronize data between two environments in CCV2
entry.content: We would advise to use the data backup/restore function to synchronize data between two SAP Commerce Cloud, see KBA 3308351 - FAQ for Data Backup and Restore - SAP Commerce Cloud (https://me.sap.com/notes/3308351) for details.

entry.title: Best Practices for Managing Users and Groups in Azure and IAS
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

Currently, we have the following scenario implemented: We have Azure as the IdP → IAS as a proxy → Cloud Apps. The groups are created in Azure, and users are assigned to those groups in Azure. These groups with their users are then provisioned to SAP IAS. From SAP IAS, the users/groups, such as SAC_Group, are provisioned to the SAC app, or the group ENABLE_Group is provisioned to Enable Now.

Since we, as the SAP team, do not have access to the Azure tenant, I am asking if there is a better approach or any best practices for managing users/groups.

Could we provision only users from Azure and create the groups directly in IAS, then manually assign users to these groups und then provision to Cloud Apps? Are there any disadvantages to this approach?

What are your experiences? How do you handle this in your environment? What are the best practices: Should users/groups be managed in Azure, or should groups be managed directly in IAS?

Which approach is better: Managing users/groups in Azure or provisioning users to IAS and managing the groups there?

Thank you so much!

Best Regards

entry.title: Re: Vendor: Withholding Tax NOT extended in new company code
entry.content: How did you create it, check first a KBA such as 2597651 - How to create customer/vendor BP with reference in S/4HANA  (especially the input role)

entry.title: Re: Output length of SALV doesn't work in job mode
entry.content: In 'background' mode, check also the print parameters of the job, the ALV will adapt to the expected print width.

entry.title: Re: Why isn't the "enhancement" I added working?

entry.title: Re: How to assign Users as Approver and Requester in SAP...
entry.content:
Hi @arroyoweisson ,

Thanks for sharing information!

Now, when I change approver mail in workflow, the approval request is sent to the Inbox.

But since all approver users are created in the same BTP subaccount,

All users share to use only one "Inbox" in my case.

So, although requester sent approval request to Approver A only, all other approvers who can access "Inbox" can see that request too and "Approve" or "Reject" too.

Only "A Citizen Developer Tool Access Request by test" is sent to Approver A and all other requests are sent to Approve B.

But both Approver A and Approver B can see all requests.

 

The requirement I would like to get is that if the approval request is sent to Approver A, only Approver A should see that request. Other Approvers should not see it.

Is it some steps missing in my case?

Could you please continue to guide for me?

Thank you very much!

 

Best Regards,

Aye Chan

entry.title: Solution to avoid manual addition of contact person partner in sales order in s4hana
entry.content:
SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA business partner  Hello experts, we have a requirement. Currently the user is adding contact person partner function in the partner tab of sales order so that the email output is triggered to send the mail to the email ID of contact person when output condition records are maintained in ECC. Now the user wants an alternate solution in S4Hana which will avoid adding contact person manually every time in sales order and also in the invoices.

Kindly advice.

entry.title: Re: Activate Generic Object Services for PR
entry.content: Look at form write_wf_relation of RBDWF007 (this one create relation betwen an IDOC and a sales order (BUS2032) adapt it for PR

are there any news about the integration with SAP Cloud ALM. The release was planned for the November 18th but I don't find any information in the what's new area at SAP Help or any information.

entry.title: Re: CSRF Token Missing Error in Android OData Service
entry.content: @Sharon_Shaji As mentioned in my previous response, we need to understand how you are calling the API in the app and the relevant details around this. Please open a support ticket with all of this information.

entry.title: Re: REVIEW: New Layout / Features for SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
Hi @Dan_Wroblewski ,
the new UI looks and feels nice but I have a problem. 
Since the update, the Dropdown component seems to be broken. If I’m seeing this correctly, the text padding is being ignored. This causes the height of the fields not display correctly. 

If I enforce the height of the fields, I can't center the displayed text. It is also not possible to change this behavior in the component editor. 


Are you aware of this problem, and do you maybe have a fix in mind? 

Also: Was this update announced somewhere? The update caught me off guard just before I wanted to deploy my app to production, and I had no way to fix this. 

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: Does SAP SLT support Azure SQL Database as a source
entry.content: Hello, I'm trying to connect SAP SLT to an Azure SQL Database (Azure SQL Server PaaS offering) via DBCO connection. I have configured the firewall and verified that network flows are open for ther required port 1433. For configuring the connection in SLT I used this connection string : OBJEMSSQL_SERVER=<DbServerName>.database.windows.net MSSQL_DBNAME=<DbBame> MSSQL_SE=1 Testing the connection return this error message : sql error 40.532 occured: Cannot open server "xxx.xxx.xxx.xxx" requested by the login. The login failed What is happening is that SAP SLT is resolving FQDN <DbServerName>.database.windows.net to its IP address "xxx.xxx.xxx.xxx", then esatblishing the connection using this IP instead of the FQDN. As a result Azure SQL Server rejects the connection because it can't identify the tenant to which it needs do direct the authentication request. I'd like to know the correct way to configure SLT connection to be able to reach a multi tenant cloud database by its FQDN and not IP address. Or is there any work around for this. Thanks, Madhuri Ingale

entry.title: Re: how can Successfactors data be successfully masked
entry.content: I hope you have figured out the answer by now. But just to update for other searching for answer to this question. UI Data Protection Masking prodiuct currently donot support masking in Successfactors. Its an Add-On for S/4HANA only and currenly only supports masking in S/4HANA.

entry.title: How to Control Module Access in SAP Business One Web Client?
entry.content:
Hello SAP experts! 

In SAP Business One, clients with a professional license have full access to all modules. However, we are looking for a way to configure the system so that only specific modules are accessible based on the client’s actual needs, while restricting companywide access to modules they do not require when using the Web Client. 

Is there a way to achieve this level of control through configuration or third-party tools? Can module access be controlled in a way that allows clients to still manage their environment autonomously, while ensuring that these access restrictions cannot be overridden - even if they have a superuser?

I’m really looking forward to hearing your suggestions.

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: How to use reorder point planning in SAP APO PP/DS
entry.content:
Hello, Please can you explain how does the masterdata (parameters related Redorder points) is updated in in PPDS? are these parameters integrated from S/4 material Master.

 

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Monday Knowledge Snippet (MKS) – 99 TM 9.6 Normalized and Load Consumption Quantities of Documen
entry.content: What is the difference between the field load consumption quantity and normalized quantity? How are they filled?

entry.title: IBP Excel Case Sensitivity
entry.content:
Hello

I am experience a strange behaviour in the Excel add-in for IBP. Here is the scenario

A Product description has been created in ECC in mixed case. In this example, the description contained the letters Mg. In subsequent days, the masterdata was updated in ECC to be MG.

Whilst the master data in IBP updated to reflect this, the excel add-in remained as Mg.

However, if I made a significant change to the masterdata (I added a 1 at the beginging) then the fully updated description with MG appeared in excel. 

To make this more mind-blowing, when I removed the 1, the case went back to Mg.

It wouldn't be a huge issue, but for the fact that the case sensitivity means that the planning object cannot be found, and so causes an error in the excel add in when updating a key figure.

Any help appreciated!

entry.title: Re: The 15 Most Important Topics for the ABAP Developer of the Future!
entry.content:
Hi Community,

" Techniques like CDS Views and AMDP are still underutilized, despite their clear advantages in optimizing performance. Using SQL Script to push processing to the database minimizes application-layer workload and enhances scalability. "

Such a great sharing, thank you so much.

It really help us a lot.

 

Regards,

🙂

ZFiori.

entry.title: Metadata not updating after change in behavior projection extension
entry.content:
Hello,

I am working on an extension for the Manage Sales Order Version 2 (F3893). I have added an action to an extension of the SalesOrderItem entity behavior and the metadata extension (the button itself). Now I would like to remove an action (I added a second one for testing purposes). I've removed it from the behavior extension and from the metadata extension. Now when I navigate to the item page I get the error "Property <my action name> not found". I've checked the metadata from the browser and the action still appears there. I checked the metadata at the /IWFND/V4_ADMIN transaction and the action does not appear in the metadata that I view from there. I will write a comment with the various things I've tried.

All the best,

Ben

entry.title: Re: Monitoring a Fiori Launchpad on SAP Cloud Portal using Dynatrace.
entry.content:
Hello,

Great article! We've implemented this and now it helps us with monitoring.

Is there any way to control load order of shell-plugins in Launchpad? Currently, we see, that this plugin is loading quite late, so most of requests already finished, before it starts any monitoring:

As you can see, vast majority of $count requests were completed earlier than Dynatrace's component has even downloaded, which makes all those requests invisible to Dynatrace. Any idea how to make Dynatrace to load earlier?

entry.title: Re: Metadata not updating after change in behavior projection extension
entry.content:
I've tried clearing the cache with:
/IWFND/V4_ADMIN, /UI2/INVALIDATE_GLOBAL_CACHES, /UI2/INVALIDATE_CLIENT_CACHES, /IWFND/CACHE_CLEANUP, /IWBEP/CACHE_CLEANUP and from the GW client /IWFND/GW_CLIENT
I've also cleared the cache of my browser and tried running the application on Chrome, Firefox and Edge, same results.

Some tips would be appreciated.

entry.title: Re: Receive supplier invoices from authorities' platform and send them to different automation solut
entry.content: Going through these IDOC's.  Can this BADI be used to determine if we use FI-AP or MM-IV methods based on seeing a purchase order number in the XML file?

entry.title: 全S-IDに対するMFA実装状況の監視に関する問い合わせ
entry.content:
SAPサポートチーム御中

 

 お世話になっております。

 

当社の方針に従い、全てのS-IDに対して多要素認証（MFA）を必須とする予定です。MFAの設定方法は理解していますが、管理者がどのユーザーがMFAを有効にしているかを確認する方法が必要です。

 

既にSAP IDサポートチームに問い合わせを行いましたが、このリクエストに対するサポートは彼らの範囲外であるようです。

 

すべてのユーザーに対するMFAの実装状況を管理者が監視する方法があるかどうか、ご教示いただけますでしょうか。
可能であれば、この情報を一覧で画面上またはダウンロード可能な表形式で閲覧できると理想的です。

 

 ご支援とご理解のほど、よろしくお願い申し上げます。


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: 全S-IDに対するMFA実装状況の監視に関する問い合わせ
entry.content:
ご担当者様

いつもお世話になっております。

全S-IDに対するMFA実装状況について、管理者がユーザーマネージメントアプリケーション画面で確認できます。

具体的な手順には以下の通りです。

1、管理者権限の持つユーザでユーザーマネージメントアプリケーションの「ユーザー」タブにアクセスします。

2、ユーザ一覧にMFAステータス 箇所で確認します。
　✔チェックマークがついているのはすでに有効済みのユーザで、何もついていないのはMFA未有効ユーザです。　

3、画面右上にある”Download List”をクリックすると、CSVファイルとしてローカルで保存し、ローカル上で確認することも可能です。

よろしくお願いいたします。

SAPサポート
Judy
